headline: We built Statewave because we believe AI should remember.
paragraphs: Not a chat history. Memory — the kind that holds across days, makes promises stick, and turns yesterday's lesson into today's better answer.
Every system we admire works because someone remembered. The line of code that didn't need rewriting. The customer's name. The mistake we agreed never to repeat.

So we built it carefully. Self-hosted, because what your agents remember is yours. Provenance-first, because any answer worth giving is worth tracing. Open source, because infrastructure this important shouldn't live behind someone else's login.
signoff: Built with care, in the open.
